scenarios.desc: Investigates intermittent failure with structured plan before solutions
scenarios.input: A deployment pipeline started failing intermittently 3 days ago. No code changes were deployed. The failure rate is ~15% and only affects the build step. Investigate.
scenarios.rationale: Intermittent failures with no code changes point to environment drift. Analyst must structure an investigation plan, not jump to fixes.

scenarios.desc: Structures feasibility analysis with concrete trade-offs
scenarios.input: Product wants to add real-time notifications. We currently use polling. Research the feasibility and trade-offs.
scenarios.rationale: Feasibility research must compare WebSocket vs SSE vs long-polling with concrete criteria, not recommend a single solution.

scenarios.desc: Distinguishes root cause from symptoms in cache analysis
scenarios.input: We have 3 microservices that each maintain their own user cache. Users report stale data after profile updates. What are we dealing with?
scenarios.rationale: Stale data is a symptom. Analyst must identify cache consistency model and propagation gaps as the root cause.

scenarios.desc: Asks clarifying questions on complex ambiguous request
scenarios.input: A feature request asks for 'AI-powered search'. Before anyone writes code, what do I need to know?
scenarios.rationale: Vague feature requests require requirements discovery. Analyst must surface unknowns like semantic search vs RAG, data volume, cost.
